body.body: Decisions: D159-D165. All Slate 0 done. Slate 1 T-trails-infra done. New: T-memory-sync #293, PROC_NODE_ADOPT seeded, test_claudecode_managers.py (16 tests). Session theme: response routing + trails + test debt + distributed memory design. Subsystems: cortex.py, basal_ganglia.py, thalamus.py, browser.py, tests/.
